# ZenkaiTV

ZenkaiTV is an anime streaming discovery interface. Browse, search, and stream anime episodes in HD across multiple sources.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://zenkaitv.com/)
- [Anime Catalog / Search](https://zenkaitv.com/#library)
- [Weekly Schedule](https://zenkaitv.com/#schedule)
- [Favorites](https://zenkaitv.com/#favorites)
- [Settings](https://zenkaitv.com/#settings)

## Features

- Multi-source anime streaming with automatic quality selection
- HD streaming with subtitle support
- Weekly airing schedule
- Continue watching progress tracking
- Favorites and watchlist management
- Dark mode optimized UI for TV, desktop, and mobile

## Notes for AI Agents

- Public pages (home, catalog, schedule) may be crawled.
- API routes (`/api/*`) should **not** be crawled or indexed.
- The site is a single-page application; all routes resolve to `index.html`.
- Content is loaded dynamically from AniList and Jikan APIs.
